title: Ethiopian Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish with Ethiopian spices, served with wheat bread.
instructions: Heat the fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and stir-fry until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the bell pepper and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Add the wheat bread pieces and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Add the smoky paprika and Ethiopian spices, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional Ethiopian spices if desired.
